response: the sacred verses of siriraag in mahala 3 speak to the spirit of devotion and the power of the guru's grace - the path of bhakti is only possible through the guru's blessing - without the guru's guidance bhakti cannot be achieved - the soul must merge with the self and understand the truth - in this way the soul becomes pure - the true word of the lord is the divine language that unites all - it is through this sacred language that the spirit finds its way to the divine - the gene of devotion is passed on through the guru's teachings - the visit to the guru is the most important act of faith - the soul must seek the guru's presence and receive the gift of spiritual awakening - the guru is the light that guides the soul through darkness - the spirit must surrender to the guru's will and find peace - the language of the soul is the language of love and devotion - the visit to the guru is a journey of the spirit towards enlightenment - the gene of truth is found in the sacred word of the guru - the spirit is transformed through the guru's grace - the language of the heart is the language of the divine - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey to the divine - the spirit is awakened through the guru's blessing - the gene of love is passed on through the sacred word - the language of the soul is the language of the divine - the visit to the guru is the path to spiritual fulfillment - the spirit is united with the divine through the guru's grace - the language of devotion is the language of the heart - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the spirit is transformed through the guru's blessing - the gene of truth is found in the sacred word - the language of the soul is the language of love - the visit to the guru is the path to enlightenment - the spirit is united with the divine through the guru's grace - the language of devotion is the language of the heart - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual fulfillment - the spirit is awakened through the guru's blessing - the gene of love is passed on through the sacred word - the language of the soul is the language of the divine - the visit to the guru is the journey of the spirit towards enlightenment - the spirit is transformed through the guru's grace - the language of devotion is the language of the heart -
